steps.action: Create a story of 100 words with 2 characters speaking and save it for later use
Hit this API 'https://mailer.hertzai.com/all_teacher_avatars_user_id?user_id={user_id}' and get avatar_id and assign each character a consistent single avatar_id through out the story
Create a video, one at a time, for each dialogue of the character story we created
Inform the Creator that the story creation was successful
For the User, check for the available story. If there is any story available, get the entire story and provide one character line to the User at a time, just like an audiobook

recipe: Final recipe involves creating a story with dialogues, fetching avatar IDs, creating videos for each dialogue, informing the creator, and providing the story to the user one line at a time.

generalized_functions.description: Creates a story with given number of words and dialogues between characters.

parameters.word_count: Number of words in the story

generalized_functions.description: Fetches avatar IDs for a given user ID.

parameters.user_id: User ID for whom avatar IDs are to be fetched

generalized_functions.description: Creates a video for a given dialogue using specified avatar ID.

parameters.dialogue: The dialogue for which video is to be created
parameters.avatar_id: The avatar ID to be used for the video

generalized_functions.description: Informs the creator about the status of the story creation.

parameters.message: The message to be sent to the creator

generalized_functions.description: Provides one line of the story to the user at a time.

parameters.line_number: The line number to be provided to the user

generalized_functions.returns: The specific line from the story

scheduled_tasks.job_description: Fetch avatar IDs for users periodically
Check for new stories and provide to users periodically
